addDescription: Add members to a target group
transferDescription: Move members from one group to another
copyDescription: Copy group memberships from one user to another
importDescription: Add members to a group from a CSV file
createDescription: Bulk create groups from CSV template
cloneDescription: Create a copy of a group with its members
mergeDescription: Combine members from multiple groups into one
moveDescription: Move groups to a different OU
managerDescription: Set the managedBy attribute on groups
exportDescription: Export group members to a CSV file
